sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id Int32, nums Array(Int32), strings Array(String), nullable_strings Array(Nullable(String)));
SELECT id, arrayPushBack(nums, 4) AS new_nums FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayPushBack(strings, (SELECT MAX(string_value) FROM (SELECT tuple('z') AS string_value))) AS extended_strings FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayPushBack(NULL, (SELECT arrayPushBack(strings, '') FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 3)) AS result FROM test_arrays;
WITH (SELECT arrayPushBack(nums, 9) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1) AS temp_array SELECT id, temp_array FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayPushBack(nums, -1) AS updated_nums FROM test_arrays WHERE arrayPushBack(nums, -1) != [];
SELECT id, arrayPushBack('', (SELECT tuple('new_string', 'another_string') AS str_values)) AS concatenated FROM test_arrays;
SELECT id, arrayPushBack(arrayPushBack(nums, 5), 6) AS double_push FROM test_arrays;
SELECT data.1 AS id, arrayPushBack(data.2, (SELECT arrayPushBack(NULL, 'test')) FROM alt_test WHERE data.1 = 1) AS test_array FROM alt_test;
